'''Ballantine Books''' is a publishing company founded in [[1950s|1952]] by [[Wikipedia:Ian Ballantine|Ian Ballantine]], and his wife [[Wikipedia:Betty Ballantine|Betty Ballantine]]. It was later purchased by [[Random House]] in [[1973]].

[[Del Rey]], which publishes all Star Wars novels (except for those originally published by [[Bantam Spectra]] between [[1991]] and [[1999]]), debuted in [[1977]] as the science-fiction [[Wikipedia:imprint|imprint]] of Ballantine Books.

==List of ''Star Wars'' books==
*[[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars: From the Adventures of Luke Skywalker'']] (December [[1976]]) {{C|first edition}}
*''[[The Star Wars Sketchbook]]'' (September [[1977]])
*''[[Star Wars Blueprints]]'' (November 1977)
*''[[The Star Wars Album]]'' (November 1977)
*''[[The Star Wars Portfolio]]'' (December 1977)
*''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope|The Art of Star Wars]]'' (December 1979)
*''[[The Empire Strikes Back Sketchbook]]'' (June [[1980]])
*''[[The Empire Strikes Back Notebook]]'' (October 1980)
*''[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back Portfolio]]'' (October 1980)
*''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' (October 1980)
*''[[Return of the Jedi Sketchbook]]'' (June [[1983]])
*''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi Portfolio]]'' (June 1983)
*''[[The Star Wars Intergalactic Passport]]'' (June 1983)
*''[[The Making of Star Wars: Return of the Jedi]]'' (August 12 1983)
*''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi]]'' (November 1983)
*''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]'' (December 1984)
